title: Unable to authenticate in compose with redirected registry
body:
### Issue Description

Compose is unable to authenticate with a private remote mirror when docker.io redirected to it. Using podman cli directly works perfectly. Compose without the indirection works too.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create registry.conf to redirect docker.io

```
cat /etc/containers/registries.conf.d/002-proxy.conf 
[[registry]]
prefix = "docker.io"
insecure = false
location = "us-docker.pkg.dev/cart-repos-shared-15f6/cart-docker-mirror"
```

2. Create compose file

```
$ cat compose.yml 
services:
  works:
    image: us-docker.pkg.dev/cart-repos-shared-15f6/cart-docker-mirror/rclone/rclone:1.69
    command: echo "Hello, World!"
  failed:
    image: docker.io/rclone/rclone:1.69
      #image: us-docker.pkg.dev/cart-repos-shared-15f6/cart-docker-mirror/
    command: echo "Hello, World!"
```

3. Authenticate with podman login as necessary
4. Symlink auth.json as necessary
5. Start podman service and set docker host as necessary
6. Pull the images

```
docker-compose pull failed
docker-compose pull works
```

### Describe the results you received

Compose pull the mirror url works. Compose pull indirected fails. Podman pull indirected works.
